content.json:
# Trustee Notes Analytics
Measure adoption and engagement of the trustee notes feature: adoption rate, active usage, and user engagement by oversight role.

> **Note on oversight roles:** The oversight role values (OversightAttorney, OversightAuditor, OversightParalegal) are currently aliased to the same strings as their non-oversight counterparts (TrialAttorney, Auditor, Paralegal) pending USTP group creation. Until distinct group values are provisioned, the User Engagement panels will also include non-oversight users with the same role strings.
## Active Usage — Notes Created Over Time

content.query:
customEvents
| where name == "trustee-note-created"
| where tostring(customDimensions.success) == "true"
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| summarize NotesCreated = count() by bin(timestamp, 7d)
| order by timestamp asc
content.title: Notes Created Per Week

content.query:
customEvents
| where name == "trustee-note-created"
| where tostring(customDimensions.success) == "true"
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| summarize NotesCreated = count() by bin(timestamp, 30d)
| order by timestamp asc
content.title: Notes Created Per Month

content.json: ## Adoption Rate — Trustees With At Least One Note

content.query:
customEvents
| where name == "trustee-note-created"
| where tostring(customDimensions.success) == "true"
| summarize NoteCount = count() by TrusteeId = tostring(customDimensions.trusteeId)
| where NoteCount >= 1
| summarize TrusteesWithNotes = dcount(TrusteeId)
content.title: Trustees With At Least One Note (All Time)

content.query:
customEvents
| where name == "trustee-note-created"
| where tostring(customDimensions.success) == "true"
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| summarize NoteCount = count() by TrusteeId = tostring(customDimensions.trusteeId)
| where NoteCount >= 1
| summarize TrusteesWithNotes = dcount(TrusteeId)
content.title: Trustees With At Least One Note (Selected Time Range)

content.json: ## User Engagement — Oversight Users Creating Notes

content.query:
customEvents
| where name == "trustee-note-created"
| where tostring(customDimensions.success) == "true"
| where tostring(customDimensions.roles) contains "TrialAttorney"
    or tostring(customDimensions.roles) contains "Auditor"
    or tostring(customDimensions.roles) contains "Paralegal"
    or tostring(customDimensions.roles) contains "TrusteeAdmin"
| summarize UsersWithNotes = dcount(tostring(customDimensions.userId))
content.title: Distinct Oversight-Role Users Who Have Created At Least One Note (All Time)

content.query:
customEvents
| where name == "diagnostics-snapshot"
| summarize arg_max(timestamp, *)
| project OversightUserCount = toint(customDimensions.oversightUserCount)
content.title: Total Users With Oversight Responsibilities (Latest Daily Snapshot)

content.query:
customEvents
| where name == "trustee-note-created"
| where tostring(customDimensions.success) == "true"
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where tostring(customDimensions.roles) contains "TrialAttorney"
    or tostring(customDimensions.roles) contains "Auditor"
    or tostring(customDimensions.roles) contains "Paralegal"
    or tostring(customDimensions.roles) contains "TrusteeAdmin"
| summarize NotesCreated = count() by bin(timestamp, 7d)
| order by timestamp asc
content.title: Notes Created Per Week by Oversight-Role Users
